seoTitle: Hungerford vs Hunters Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hungerford and Hunters Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hungerford vs Hunters Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hungerford and Hunters Hill.
heading: Hungerford vs Hunters Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hungerford, New South Wales and Hunters Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hungerford has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Hunters Hill (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hungerford or Hunters Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hungerford has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Hunters Hill scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hungerford scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Hunters Hill scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hungerford or Hunters Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hungerford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
